package rulecoverage

func NegativeResponseEnvelopeShapingDuplicatedAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "response_envelope_shaping_duplicated_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated success-response envelope formatting that should live in a renderer or transport helper."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
